scenes.headline: Education inflation has run at 5-6% per year for two decades while bank savings paid less than 3%
scenes.body: The gap compounds. A RM50,000 degree today becomes RM120,000 by the time your newborn enrols.
scenes.shotNotes: static, text-dense composition — headline must wrap cleanly

thumbnailBrief: Authoritative tone. Headline is unusually long (21 words) — must wrap to 4-5 lines without overflow. Navy text on offwhite background. Body copy below in muted secondary text. Stress-test layout: edge case for headline-fit logic.
